outcomes.decisionNote: Chairman selected 1D: permit TW equity source use for derived metric planning only; this does not authorize public source promotion, SQL, Supabase writes, row coverage points, or real score source.
Chairman selected 2C: attribution posture may support delayed public display copy after later gates; this does not authorize live data promotion or redistribution.
Chairman selected 6F: redistribution, downloads, exports, API reuse, and downstream copies remain blocked pending further review.
Chairman selected 5B: internal retention for testing and validation may be planned; public redistribution and production daily_prices mutation remain blocked.
Chairman selected 7B: internal rate-limit and outage handling may be planned; remote reads, retries, and scheduling still require later execution gates.
Chairman selected 3C: delayed or incomplete public display posture may be prepared with disclosure after later gates; this does not authorize source ingestion or real score source.
Chairman selected 4D: derived signal and metric planning is allowed after later gates; public scoring, rankings, recommendations, and scoreSource real remain blocked.
